title: Add three-option HOME page interface (List, Rent, Invest)

requirements.text: Update the HOME page (route "/", file: frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx) to prominently display a 3-option interface with exactly three primary options: "List", "Rent", and "Invest".

quotes: HOME page interface offering 3 option list rent invest

acceptanceCriteria: When visiting "/", users can clearly see three distinct options labeled "List", "Rent", and "Invest" without scrolling on common laptop/mobile viewports (responsive).
The option labels are in English and match exactly: "List", "Rent", "Invest".
The section is visually consistent with the existing site styling (Tailwind + existing typography/spacing conventions already used on HomePage).

requirements.text: Wire the three HOME page options to existing routes using TanStack Router navigation: "List" navigates to "/listing", "Rent" navigates to "/rent", and "Invest" navigates to "/invest".

quotes: HOME page interface offering 3 option list rent invest

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking/tapping "List" navigates to the existing Listing marketing page at "/listing".
Clicking/tapping "Rent" navigates to the existing Rent page at "/rent".
Clicking/tapping "Invest" navigates to the existing Invest page at "/invest".
Navigation uses existing routing patterns already present in HomePage (useNavigate with navigate({ to: ... })).

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui (compose existing shadcn components instead).
Do not change routes in frontend/src/App.tsx; reuse the existing "/listing", "/rent", and "/invest" routes already defined.
No backend changes; this is a HOME page UI/navigation update only.
nonGoals: Changing authentication behavior or adding new login requirements.
Adding or modifying backend listing/invest/rent business logic.
